subject: fix(burger-menu): guard arrow key idx=-1 edge case, clean up action timer
body:
ArrowUp with no focused button (idx=-1) calculated wrong index, skipping
last item. Now falls through to last item for ArrowUp, first for ArrowDown.
handleItem setTimeout now tracked and cleared on unmount to prevent stale
callbacks — per AI_MISTAKES.md timer cleanup lesson.

Tags: burger-menu, a11y, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-sync
Semver: patch
